# Newie & Phila's Decor

> Premium event decor business in Thohoyandou, Venda, South Africa. Founded by siblings Ronewa ("Newie") and Philadaphia ("Phila") Mahodze. Services include weddings, baby showers, picnics, parties, family gatherings, and custom events.

Newie & Phila's Decor (also known as Phila's Decor) is a sibling-run event styling company based on Punda Maria Road, Tshilungoma, Thohoyandou, 0950, Venda, Limpopo. Contact: 081 417 0801, 066 155 8793, WhatsApp +27 81 417 0801, email Mahodzephila@gmail.com.

## Business

- [Full business profile](https://philasdecor.co.za/llms-full.txt): Complete services, founders, values, booking policy, and contact details in plain text.
- [Website](https://philasdecor.co.za/): Main site with gallery, services, about story, and contact.
